## Checklist

- [ ] The change stays within Kontext's general control-plane boundary.
- [ ] Generated code and manifests are current.
- [ ] New behavior has focused tests.
- [ ] Examples and status messages match the implementation.
- [ ] The diff contains no credentials or private diagnostics.
